name: 炼气士
description: 经脉已通，可纳灵气于体内。灵气上限与灵气强度随炼气境层数增长。
//en_us_description: Meridians opened; able to hold qi within the body. The qi cap and qi power grow with each Qi Refining layer.
//: 修士的隐藏载体特性。携带两条 enchantment：qi_max 把炼气层数换算成灵气上限增量（层数×20）;qi_power 把层数换算成灵气强度增量（层数×8,使炼气圆满时强度系数 qi_power/100 约 2.0,法术威力翻倍）。境界靠 add 抬两条线,符合 doc 数值基准（境界走 add、心法/丹药走 multiply）。首次习得境界 spell 时由 EOC_immortal_path_bind_realm_trait 授予。两条线 = 100（基础）+ 本特性 + 任何其它同名来源,引擎自动累加。/ Hidden carrier trait. Two enchantments: qi_max (layer×20 → qi cap) and qi_power (layer×8 → qi power, so a full Qi Refining gives ~2.0× the base, doubling art power). Realm scales both via add; any other same-key source stacks automatically.

name: 草木同春
description: 久修木行所成之体。生机内蕴，与草木同其荣枯——伤势愈合稍快，气力恢复略增，所御木行之力愈纯。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by long Wood cultivation; vitality runs within, sharing the wax and wane of growing things. Wounds mend a touch faster, stamina recovers a little quicker, and one's Wood-phase power runs purer.
//: 木行功法载体特性。被动：清醒回血 + 回体力 + 木行极化（polarization_wood +0.3,基础 1→1.3,放大木行法术威力 30%）。习得木行吐纳即授予。数值保守（练气期弱增益），待平衡。/ Wood carrier trait. Passive: awake HP regen + stamina regen + wood polarization (+0.3 → 1.3× on wood arts).

name: 阳炎附骨
description: 久修火行所成之体。阳炎潜入筋骨，体魄染炎上之力——近身搏杀更具威势，不畏寒冷，所御火行之力愈烈。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by long Fire cultivation; yang-flame sinks into sinew and bone. Melee strikes hit harder, cold holds no fear, and one's Fire-phase power burns fiercer.
//: 火行功法载体特性。被动：近战伤害 + 抗寒（保暖）+ 火行极化（polarization_fire +0.3,基础 1→1.3,放大火弹术等火行法术威力 30%）。习得火行吐纳即授予。待平衡。/ Fire carrier trait. Passive: melee damage + cold resistance + fire polarization (+0.3 → 1.3× on fire arts like Fireball).

name: 不动如山
description: 久修土行所成之体。厚重之元沉于体魄，坚凝如山岳——皮肉御伤，难被撼动击退，所御土行之力愈厚。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by long Earth cultivation; ponderous essence settles into the frame, solid as a mountain. Flesh resists harm, knockback and knockdown find no purchase, and one's Earth-phase power grows weightier.
//: 土行功法载体特性。被动：全护甲 + 抗击退 + 抗击倒 + 土行极化（polarization_earth +0.3）。习得土行吐纳即授予。待平衡。/ Earth carrier trait. Passive: armor + knockback/knockdown resist + earth polarization (+0.3).

name: 百炼成锋
//en_us_name: A Hundred Temperings to an Edge
description: 久修金行所成之体。筋骨百炼如精钢，肃杀锋锐内蕴——出手锋利精准，所御金行之力愈利。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by long Metal cultivation; sinew and bone tempered a hundredfold like fine steel, a killing edge held within. Strikes land sharp and true, and one's Metal-phase power cuts keener.
//: 金行功法载体特性。被动：近战伤害 + 命中 + 金行极化（polarization_metal +0.3）。习得金行吐纳即授予。无近战破甲 enchant value（仅远程有），故以伤害+命中表达「锋锐」。待平衡。/ Metal carrier trait. Passive: melee damage + to-hit + metal polarization (+0.3); no melee armor-pen value exists.

name: 渊渟
description: 久修水行所成之体。心静如止水，丹田如渊纳百川——灵气上限更高，蓄养更深，所御水行之力愈柔韧。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by long Water cultivation; the mind still as standing water, the dantian holding qi like an abyss holds rivers. A higher qi cap, a deeper reserve, and one's Water-phase power flows more supple.
//: 水行功法载体特性。被动：额外 qi_max（与炼气士同通道，自动叠加）+ 水行极化（polarization_water +0.3）。「回灵气快」目前无 enchant 钩子（打坐回灵气是 EOC 固定值），故仅以上限加成表达;后续可在 EOC 内按特性加成。待平衡。/ Water carrier trait. Passive: extra qi_max (same channel, stacks) + water polarization (+0.3). Faster qi recovery has no enchant hook yet.

name: 血煞侵髓
description: 久修血煞炼尸功所成之体。死气血煞侵入骨髓，凶威渐长——然邪气反噬，根本受损，气血不宁。
//en_us_description: The body shaped by the Blood-Fiend Corpse Refining; death-qi and blood-fiend essence seep into the marrow, breeding menace — but the foul qi gnaws back, eroding one's foundation and unsettling the blood.
//: 魔功载体特性。框架占位：被动近战伤害（凶威）+ 持续损 health（MOD_HEALTH 负，邪道反噬代价）。「需附近尸体/血液才加速修炼」等机制留待后续，届时代价与收益再做平衡。学会血煞炼化即授予。待平衡。/ Demonic carrier trait. Framework placeholder: melee damage bonus + ongoing health drain (MOD_HEALTH negative) as the dark cost. Corpse/blood-gated speedup is left for later.
